name: Kintsugi - Product Platform
content:
Sales Tax Automation Platform
Accurate global sales tax, VAT, and GST compliance, everywhere you need
Connect your existing ERP, HR, and ecommerce systems to Kintsugi and automate your sales tax compliance.
Book a Demo
Try Now
Why Ecommerce & SaaS leaders choose Kintsugi
Modern sales tax, VAT, and GST infrastructure designed for SaaS and ecommerce companies that move fast
Seamless integrations, 24/7 support, and enterprise-grade performance
Kintsugi grows with you, from your first tax return to global expansion
The current sales tax model wasn't designed with online sellers in mind.
The Struggle
Increasing sales tax complexity
Manual sales tax is risky
Expanding into new territories
Data fragmentation
How Kintsugi Helps
Clarify your exposure, everywhere
AI-powered automated compliance
Kintsugi expands with your sales
No-code integration for all your systems
End-to-End Automation
Automate your entire sales tax, VAT, and GST lifecycle:
Monitor where you have nexus for free
Register in new jurisdictions fast
Calculate tax in real time
Remit and file accurately, automatically
Built for Modern
No more one-size-fits-all. Kintsugi was built for:
Recurring revenue models
Usage-based billing
Global digital sales and subscriptions
Clean Integrations,
No Engineering
Plug into your existing stack with:
Prebuilt integrations (Stripe, Shopify, Chargebee, Amazon, Walmart, etc.)
Powerful API for custom workflows
Connect with
no-code integrations
, APIs, and SDK
Connect your billing
Connect with a click to sync your transactions in real-time. Track nexus exposure and tax liabilities. Ensure compliance everywhere you sell.
Connect your ecommerce systems
Hassle-free no-code setup to sync your sales platform. Ensure compliance wherever you sell.
Connect your HR
and payroll
Your first hire in a jurisdiction may trigger physical presence exposure. Connect your HR and payroll to ensure compliance everywhere you hire.

No credit card required.
